ItacPersonItem.Notes: See his biography by Monica Cerroni, in DBI. It is not clear to which Paduan Academy Guarini addressed a speech to thank the members for electing him as their Prince, see `A Gli Accademici in Padova`, in his Prose (1611).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
